Washington, Wyoming. the Dakotas.
Oregon. Minnesota, Oklahoma, Iowa.
Nebraska, Colorado, Illinois, Arizona,
Texas and all other states and ter
ritories interested in the live stock
industry.


No formal program has been ar
ranged for the convention, but the
list of subjects prepared for discus
sion, together with the number of
prominent persons who have signi-
fed their intention to be present. as
sure the most notable convention in
the history of the association. The
governors of several of the western
states will be present. Among the
matters to receive attention are rail-
road rates, quarantine laws, irrigation
and various measures of state and
federal legislation in which the stock
raisers are particularly interested.
